metadata.title: Sharp 2v1 Site Defense with Clean Headshots in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this tight site hold where quick aiming and smart positioning make all the difference. How do you handle clutch moments like this in VALORANT? Share your favorite defensive plays below!

Let me know your best clutch plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
